  +--------------+
  |  Exit Point  |
  +--------------+
          ^
+---------++----------+
|          |          |
|          |          |
|   +------+------+   |
|   |  Process B  |   |
|   +-------------+   |
|          ^          |
|          |          |
|   +------+------+   |
|   |  Process A  |   |
|   +-------------+   |
|          ^          |
|          +-------+  |
+[  Core Logic  ]--|--+
          +-------++
  +-------+-------+
  |  Entry Point  |
  +---------------+
